url.title: Instagram post URL or shortcode
url.description: The full Instagram post URL, or the Instagram shortcode. Recommended URL format: https://www.instagram.com/username/p/SHORTCODE/

shortcode.title: Instagram post shortcode
shortcode.description: Legacy input alias. Prefer the URL or shortcode field above for new integrations. Example shortcode: DUBtwxGEqz2.

media_id.title: Instagram media id / shortcode
media_id.description: Deprecated legacy input name. Use the URL or shortcode field above for new integrations. This actor treats media_id as the Instagram post shortcode.
